commit_scope: Add the Windows amd64 Hati-OS target floor, prove the fkwu self-JIT runtime on this Windows 11 host without Go/clang/LLVM on the runtime PATH, and repair the fourth-arm fkwu builder so the hati-os-targets band runs four-way on Windows.
evidence_refs: local:nvidia-smi NVIDIA GeForce RTX 4070 driver 591.86 CUDA 13.1

commands: subagent Aquinas: reran verify_windows_fkwu_self_jit.ps1, fourth-arm-gate, and git diff --check
local_validation.notes: Windows host proof passed: verify_windows_fkwu_self_jit.ps1 reported cold=317811, hot=317811, njit=26, and runtime-toolchain-free with PATH=C:\WINDOWS\System32;C:\WINDOWS and go=absent clang=absent llvm_objdump=absent. The fkwu manifest gate reported PASS-4WAY hati-os-targets after form/scripts/fourth-arm.sh learned the Windows generated-C compatibility shims and GCC fallback needed to build the emitted universal walker on this host. Focused validate reported fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way (fkwu + pre-flattened tables), verdict 131071, 1 ok, 0 divergent. Host facts collected locally: Microsoft Windows 11 Home 10.0.26200, PowerShell 5.1.26100.7920, NVIDIA GeForce RTX 4070 with driver 591.86 and CUDA 13.1 from nvidia-smi, LLVM clang 22.1.8, llvm-objdump present, and TDM-GCC 10.3.0 present as the Windows C carrier fallback. git diff --check passed with line-ending warnings only.

ci_validation.notes: Not pushed yet; PR CI has not run for this branch.

commands: Hostinger Auto Deploy on main after merge
deploy_validation.notes: This slice changes Form target catalog, fourth-arm build harness, proof script, docs, and evidence only. Public route behavior is unchanged before merge.

phase_gate.gate: Windows must expose a Hati-OS target row and prove the fkwu self-JIT runtime without requiring Go, clang, LLVM, or local oracles at runtime.
phase_gate.next: Run pre-commit gates, push branch, open PR, monitor CI, then merge only if checks pass.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The Windows host now has an explicit target row with GPU/CUDA/DirectML direction, explicit MLX unsupported status, and a verified fkwu self-JIT runtime floor. The runtime proof executes the generated fkwu self-JIT binary with no Go, clang, or LLVM tools resolvable on PATH and observes a hot native flip (njit=26). The Form catalog proof now runs four-way on fkwu for hati-os-targets at verdict 131071.
public_endpoints: local-only: Form/fkwu runtime and target catalog; no public HTTP endpoint changed
test_flows: Build the Form-emitted fkc-emit-jit witness, compile it with local clang as build oracle, strip runtime PATH to Windows system directories, run cold fib28 and hot fib28, and assert cold=317811 hot=317811 njit>0.
Build the emitted universal fkwu walker on Windows through the fourth-arm harness and run hati-os-targets through Go/Rust/TypeScript/fkwu, asserting PASS-4WAY and verdict 131071.
Run independent sub-agent validation over the same commands and confirm no edits were made.
